title: taraxacum amarellum
intro: Taraxacum amarellum, commonly known as the dandelion, is a perennial plant with a history of use in traditional medicine. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers contain medicinal properties, including antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and cardiotonic glycosides, which are known to have a positive effect on the heart. The health benefits of Taraxacum amarellum include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum amarellum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used as a dietary supplement in capsule or tablet form.
